title: Agent Clearing Demo Report
summary: Local Agent Clearing Demo completed. The request was not executed. RefusalGraph returned high caution. The clearing decision was require_human_approval. A local draft clearing receipt was created and the local verification result was locally_valid. Fee metering remains placeholder_only. No network, payment, billing, settlement, tracking, analytics, publishing, or action execution occurred.
requested_action_summary: The local clearing request concerned a payment or money-movement action. Raw request content, real identities, targets, values, and private data are intentionally omitted.
refusalgraph_summary: The local RefusalGraph query found 2 matching draft refusal signals and returned high caution. No network or external lookup was performed.
clearing_decision_summary: The local clearing decision was require_human_approval. The safe reason summary is: the result remained draft-only and unexecuted, the action was high risk, evidence was incomplete, human approval was missing, money movement was requested, payment intent was unclear, payment was requested, RefusalGraph caution was high. Human approval is required before any further action.
receipt_summary: A local Agent Clearing Receipt was created with draft_only status. It was not persisted, exchanged, published, billed, or used to execute the requested action.
verification_summary: The receipt verification-readiness result was locally_valid. This is a local structural and safety-flag check only; no external verification or network validation occurred.
fee_metering_summary: The local fee-metering status was placeholder_only. No billable event, charge, payment, billing record, settlement, or machine-to-machine fee was triggered.
safety_summary: The source pipeline reported local safe flags. The report remained private-data-free, unpublished, untracked, non-networked, non-commercial, and non-executing.
future_value_summary: This local chain demonstrates how RefusalGraph caution, clearing decisions, receipts, verification readiness, and fee placeholders could support a future Agent Clearing House without exposing private data or executing transactions.
